name: Appfigures
description: Appfigures — App store analytics aggregating reviews, downloads, and revenue data for iOS, Android, and Mac.

seo.title: Appfigures — Product Analytics
seo.meta_description: Appfigures: Appfigures — App store analytics aggregating reviews, downloads, and revenue data for iOS, Android, and Mac.

when_to_use: Aggregate app store reviews for sentiment analysis
Track iOS + Android download trends in one dashboard
Revenue monitoring across App Store and Google Play
Keyword ranking tracking for ASO optimization
Competitive intelligence on rival app store ratings

pros: Aggregates App Store and Play Store data in one view
Review monitoring with sentiment and keywords
Reasonable pricing for indie and small studios
cons: Download and revenue estimates can be imprecise
Not a product analytics tool; store-level only
Limited custom reporting versus enterprise suites
review.verdict: Reliable store analytics tool that covers iOS, Android, and Mac; good pick for indie and mid-size app teams.
review.best_for: Indie devs and app studios wanting aggregated store metrics, reviews, and competitor tracking.
review.not_for: In-app product analytics, enterprise mobile measurement, or precise financial reporting.
